data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: WhatsApp minimizes decision-making time by offering a simple and direct interface.
data.technical_spec: Limited number of primary actions in top navigation.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Interaction targets (e.g., buttons) are large and easily clickable.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design with adaptive touch zones.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing design suggests that WhatsApp is easy to use.
data.technical_spec: Adoption of a clean, minimalist design.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design patterns familiar to users from other messaging apps are utilized.
data.technical_spec: Familiar UI elements like chat bubbles and status indicators.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: The interface avoids overwhelming users with information by limiting on-screen elements.
data.technical_spec: Simplified chat layouts with collapsible sections.
